findings.issue: Automated decision consent flow is insufficient
findings.recommended_fix: Implement explicit consent flow for automated decisions

findings.issue: Compliance for Baku launch is unclear
findings.recommended_fix: Conduct thorough review of AZ Personal Data Protection Act requirements

findings.issue: Using AURA score for hiring decisions may expose platform to legal liability
findings.recommended_fix: Consult with legal expert to assess potential liability and implement necessary safeguards

findings.issue: DPAs are in place for Supabase, Google Cloud, and Railway
findings.recommended_fix: Review and update DPAs as necessary to ensure compliance

findings.issue: Current ToS may not cover AI-generated assessments
findings.recommended_fix: Review and update ToS to explicitly address AI-generated assessments
